# docs-portal

> docs-portal builds self-contained, searchable HTML documentation portals from
> Markdown folders, with zero-config setup and offline-friendly output.

docs-portal is a Python CLI for documentation folders. It converts Markdown
files into styled HTML pages, indexes existing hand-written HTML, and writes a
single searchable portal. Generated pages inline CSS and local assets so the
output works offline and can be copied as standalone files.

## Install

- `pipx install "git+https://github.com/Alexclne/docs-portal.git"`: recommended
  isolated install from GitHub.
- `python -m pip install "git+https://github.com/Alexclne/docs-portal.git"`:
  install into the active virtual environment.

## Core Commands

- `docs-portal init`: detect chapters from folders and create
  `docs-portal.toml`.
- `docs-portal`: build the portal with default settings.
- `docs-portal build --out index.html --no-timestamp`: build for web hosting
  with reproducible output.

## Documentation

- [README](README.md): overview, features, install and quick start.
- [Getting Started](docs/getting-started.md): first install and build flow.
- [CLI Reference](docs/cli.md): commands, options and build report.
- [Configuration Reference](docs/configuration.md): `docs-portal.toml` sections
  and keys.
- [Contributing](CONTRIBUTING.md): development setup, tests and project layout.
- [Changelog](CHANGELOG.md): release history.

## Source

- [Main package](src/docs_portal/__init__.py): CLI, rendering, config, portal
  generation and init logic.
- [Module entry point](src/docs_portal/__main__.py): `python -m docs_portal`.
- [Portal stylesheet](src/docs_portal/docs_portal.css): embedded CSS used by
  generated pages.
- [Tests](tests/): pytest coverage for rendering, builds, taxonomy and config.

## Important Behavior

- Generated Markdown pages and the portal are marked with `ts-docs-generated`.
- Hand-written HTML is indexed but not overwritten unless it carries the
  generated marker.
- `--no-timestamp` omits build timestamps so generated output can be
  byte-identical across runs.
- The default portal filename is `DOCUMENTATION.html`.
